---
title: "Figure 1: Geographic Distribution (Morris 272)"
author: "subhash"
date: "2026-03-05"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("../../.."))
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(maps)

# ---------------------------
# Input (uses first existing path)
# ---------------------------
input_candidates <- c(
  "data/1.pca_geo/sorghum_morris_mcpd_overlaps.xlsx",
  "/Users/subhashmahamkali/Documents/New project/sorghum_morris_mcpd_overlaps.xlsx"
)

input_file <- input_candidates[file.exists(input_candidates)][1]
if (is.na(input_file)) {
  stop("Could not find overlap workbook. Place it in data/1.pca_geo/ or keep it at the New project path.")
}

# ---------------------------
# Output folder
# ---------------------------
out_dir <- "graphs/01_publication/figure_1"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# ---------------------------
# Figure settings
# ---------------------------
# Keep this TRUE for the 5-race publication panel aligned to PCA classes.
major5_only <- TRUE

# Custom Illustrator panel dimensions
fig_w <- 10.5
fig_h <- 14.5
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------
# Load and prep data
# ---------------------------
geo_df <- read_excel(input_file, sheet = "Overlaps") %>%
  filter(!is.na(DECLATITUDE), !is.na(DECLONGITUDE)) %>%
  mutate(
    race = tolower(trimws(`Morphological type (Race)`)),
    DECLATITUDE = as.numeric(DECLATITUDE),
    DECLONGITUDE = as.numeric(DECLONGITUDE)
  )

# PCA-aligned colors
color_vec <- c(
  "durra" = "#FF7F00",
  "kafir" = "#E69F00",
  "caudatum" = "#984EA3",
  "guinea" = "#56B4E9",
  "bicolor" = "#A6A6A6"
)

if (major5_only) {
  keep_races <- names(color_vec)
  plot_df <- geo_df %>% filter(race %in% keep_races)
  race_order <- keep_races
} else {
  race_order <- sort(unique(geo_df$race))
  pal <- grDevices::hcl.colors(max(length(race_order), 3), palette = "Set 3")
  color_vec <- setNames(pal[seq_along(race_order)], race_order)
  plot_df <- geo_df
}

world <- map_data("world")

# Illustrator-safe crop: subset data before drawing so the exported PDF
# does not carry a hidden full-world layer outside the visible panel.
bbox <- list(
  xmin = -25,
  xmax = 130,
  ymin = -42,
  ymax = 56
)

world_crop <- world %>%
  filter(
    long >= bbox$xmin, long <= bbox$xmax,
    lat >= bbox$ymin, lat <= bbox$ymax
  )

plot_df_crop <- plot_df %>%
  filter(
    DECLONGITUDE >= bbox$xmin, DECLONGITUDE <= bbox$xmax,
    DECLATITUDE >= bbox$ymin, DECLATITUDE <= bbox$ymax
  )

# Origin/star location (eastern Sahel / NE Africa, schematic)
origin_lon <- 33
origin_lat <- 13

# Four main dispersal arrows
arrows_df <- tibble::tribble(
  ~x,   ~y,   ~xend, ~yend, ~route,
   33,   13,   -12,   14,   "West Africa",
   33,   13,    22,  -28,   "Southern Africa",
   33,   13,    78,   21,   "South Asia",
   78,   21,   113,   38,   "East Asia"
)
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------
# Plot
# ---------------------------
p <- ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(
    data = world_crop,
    aes(long, lat, group = group),
    fill = "#f3efe6", color = "#8c8779", linewidth = 0.25
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = arrows_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend),
    arrow = grid::arrow(length = unit(0.18, "inches"), type = "closed"),
    linewidth = 0.8,
    color = "#303030",
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  annotate("point", x = origin_lon, y = origin_lat, shape = 8, size = 7.2, color = "#101010", stroke = 1.2) +
  annotate("point", x = origin_lon, y = origin_lat, shape = 8, size = 4.8, color = "#FFD23F", stroke = 1.1) +
  geom_point(
    data = plot_df_crop,
    aes(x = DECLONGITUDE, y = DECLATITUDE, color = race),
    size = 2.4, alpha = 0.93, stroke = 0.25
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_vec, breaks = race_order, name = "Race") +
  coord_quickmap(
    xlim = c(bbox$xmin, bbox$xmax),
    ylim = c(bbox$ymin, bbox$ymax),
    expand = FALSE
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Geographic Distribution of 272 Morris-Overlap Sorghum Accessions",
    subtitle = "Africa-Asia focus with origin star and schematic dispersal routes",
    x = "Longitude",
    y = "Latitude"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#dbeaf4", color = NA),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "#c2d4e2", linewidth = 0.35),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 19, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11)
  ) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE, override.aes = list(size = 4)))

print(p)
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------
# Save outputs
# ---------------------------
base_name <- if (major5_only) "figure1_geo_morris272_major5_with_star_arrows" else "figure1_geo_morris272_allraces_with_star_arrows"

out_pdf_custom <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(base_name, "_10.5x14.5cm.pdf"))

ggsave(out_pdf_custom, p, width = fig_w, height = fig_h, units = "cm", bg = "white")

cat("Input used:", input_file, "\n")
cat("Rows with coordinates:", nrow(geo_df), "\n")
cat("Rows plotted:", nrow(plot_df_crop), "\n")
cat("Saved:\n", out_pdf_custom, "\n")
```
